description: CompositionBeige printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, Mandarin neck, pintucks on the front, A-line waist with mild pleats and a split side hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this beige kurta from w!
